description: You send a death link whenever you spin out.
To receive a death link, spin out. If you did not pass a corner that turn, stay where you are.
Whether to include the basic upgrade cards 1-17
You must have one of either basic upgrades or advanced upgrades turned on.
Whether to include the advanced upgrade cards 18-48
You must have one of either basic upgrades or advanced upgrades turned on.

include_heavy_rain_expansion.display_name: Include upgrade cards from the Heavy Rain expansion?
description: Whether to include the Heavy Rain upgrade cards 49-54
In order to use this, you must have advanced upgrades turned on.

include_tunnel_vision_expansion.display_name: Include upgrade cards from the Tunnel Vision expansion?
description: Whether to include the Tunnel Vision upgrade cards 55-60
In order to use this, you must have advanced upgrades turned on.

include_rocky_road_expansion.display_name: Include upgrade cards from the Rocky Road expansion?
description: Whether to include the Rocky Road upgrade cards 61-66
In order to use this, you must have advanced upgrades turned on.
Whether to include the Sponsorship cards
These will not affect logic and are intended to break logic.
Adds two kinds of traps: the Heat trap and the Stress trap.
The Heat trap requires you to put a Heat from your Engine into your discard pile.
The Stress trap requires you to boost for free on your next turn as if you played a Stress card.
